medicalHelp.location: South Stand Concourse, Near Block 132 (Gate C)
medicalHelp.instructions: For severe medical concerns, look for roaming medics in neon vests, head directly to Section 132 First Aid Center, or call the stadium emergency helpline immediately.

security.location: North Stand Control Room, Near Block 102 (Gate A)
security.instructions: Alert nearest safety steward in high-visibility uniforms or go to security desk at Gate A lobby to report security concerns.

lostChildCenter.location: Family Activity Zone, North-West Stand, Block 155 (Gate E)
lostChildCenter.procedure: If you find a lost child or are separated from your child, contact the nearest steward immediately. They will escort children to the Lost Child Center at Gate E for safe reunification.

assemblyArea: Main Plaza Area (Outside gate A and B parking fields)
